perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige turtleneck sweater, sits at a table and talks to the camera, holding a large covered food container. (2) She removes the lid to reveal a large bowl of red, saucy braised chicken (Jjimdak) with glass noodles and rice cakes. (3) A sequence of shots shows her using chopsticks and a spoon to lift ingredients—specifically thick glass noodles, pieces of chicken, and rice cakes—into her mouth. She chews with exaggerated expressions of enjoyment and nodding. (4) In the final segment, she holds up a carton of Coolpis peach drink, drinks it, and gives a thumbs up to the camera while smiling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat K-pop style background music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, introducing the 'secret' Korean menu. (2) The sound of the plastic lid being peeled back and some light splashes are heard. (3) Loud, clear slurping and chewing sound effects (ASMR style) are layered over the music as she eats the noodles and chicken. (4) The music continues at a steady volume as she makes a final recommendation and drinks the beverage.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓國人最近都不吃辣炒年糕了' (Koreans don't eat spicy rice cakes recently) - Provocative hook. (2) '獵奇辣燉雞湯' (Yeopgi Spicy Braised Chicken) - Informational label. (3) '記得加冬粉喔' (Remember to add glass noodles) - Practical advice. (4) '這是韓國人偷偷吃的隱藏菜單' (This is a secret menu Koreans secretly eat) - Curiosity-driven hook. (5) '冬粉=靈魂' (Glass noodles = Soul) - Emphatic variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Food Reveal -> Close-up Mukbang -> Product Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator performing the mukbang throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a neutral beige ribbed turtleneck sweater and a small necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting, likely a home or hotel room, with a wooden shelf/cabinet visible in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio-style lighting focusing on the subject and the food.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of 'Secret' Menu -> Ingredient Breakdown -> Taste Demonstration -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific dish (Spicy Braised Chicken) from the brand Yeopgi Tteokbokki by framing it as a local 'hidden secret' that is currently more popular than standard rice cakes. It targets a Chinese-speaking audience interested in Korean food trends, using the Mukbang format to drive appetite and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear display of brand logos on packaging, repetitive naming of the dish and brand, and direct recommendation to viewers to try it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mukbang transitions with close-up food shots.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic short-video 'hook' techniques, such as debunking a common stereotype ('Koreans don't eat tteokbokki') to introduce the actual subject matter.
